files.00_Overview.md: Good structure with 3W elements. Add Learning Objectives section at the beginning. Enhance Key Takeaways section - currently only has Concept Check. Remove redundant Quick Reference table as content is already in Section 3.
files.01_Introduction.md: Significant redundancy with 00_Overview.md - basic template examples and OpenFOAM template classes table are duplicated. Merge content from 00_Overview into this file or differentiate: 00_Overview as high-level roadmap, 01_Introduction as first learning content with proper Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways.
files.02_Template_Syntax.md: Well-structured with good code examples and image placeholder. Missing Learning Objectives. Add Key Takeaways summary. The Quick Reference is useful here - keep. Concept Check questions are good.
files.03_Internal_Mechanics.md: Content mismatch - title says 'Internal Mechanics' but content focuses on GeometricField internals rather than template instantiation mechanisms. This should either be renamed to reflect GeometricField focus OR restructured to explain template instantiation, two-phase lookup, and name resolution. Add Learning Objectives. Content is very detailed but missing template-specific mechanics.
files.04_Instantiation_and_Specialization.md: Good coverage of core concepts. Missing Learning Objectives section. Add Key Takeaways section summarizing when to use each type. Quick Reference is useful. Concept Check is well-designed.
files.05_Design_Patterns.md: Good pattern coverage. Add Learning Objectives. Add Key Takeaways comparing patterns (when to use CRTP vs policy-based). Some code examples could use more context. Expression templates section needs more explanation - currently too minimal.
files.06_Common_Errors_and_Debugging.md: Practical and well-organized. Missing Learning Objectives. Add Key Takeaways with troubleshooting flowchart. Quick Troubleshooting table is excellent. Could add more OpenFOAM-specific template errors.
files.07_Practical_Exercise.md: Good exercise progression. Missing Learning Objectives. Add Key Takeaways after each exercise or at the end. SFINAE exercise (Exercise 4) lacks explanation - add what SFINAE is and why it's useful. Missing solution hints or expected outputs.

global_strategy: Apply consistent 3W Framework (What/Why/How) to all files. Add Learning Objectives at the beginning and Key Takeaways at the end of every file. Resolve redundancy between 00_Overview and 01_Introduction - either merge or clearly differentiate purposes. Strengthen the learning progression: Overview→Introduction→Syntax→Internal Mechanics→Specialization→Patterns→Debugging→Exercises. Ensure each file builds on previous concepts rather than repeating them. Fix content mismatch in 03_Internal_Mechanics to align with template mechanics title. Add more OpenFOAM-specific examples throughout. Consider adding a skills/mastery tracking system per file.
